meta.title: Nikoletta Csonka · Language Coaching
meta.description: Break through the language barrier. Conversational coaching in English, German, and Hungarian. In Graz or online.

hero.headline:
Studied for years.
Still can't speak?
hero.subheadline: I help adults and kids break through the silence that years of rigid school learning left behind. Conversation first, grammar as a tool, always at your pace.

items.name: Conversational English
items.description: One-on-one sessions focused on speaking. Grammar as a tool, not the goal. You talk and I help you say it better.

items.name: Business English
items.description: Emails, presentations, meetings, negotiations. Practical business language for the real world. No textbook phrases.

items.name: German lessons / tutoring
items.description: Whether you are a student or an adult — we work on exactly what is holding you back. For exams, for everyday fluency, or anything in between.

items.name: Exam Preparation
items.description: A2, B1, B2, C1. Structured practice with real test conditions and targeted feedback on your exact weak spots.

items.name: Hungarian for Beginners
items.description: Hungarian is famously difficult but I make it logical. Great for expats who want to connect with Hungarian-speaking family or colleagues, or for anyone who needs the language for practical reasons: visa applications, residency permits, citizenship tests.

items.name: Kids & Teens
items.description: Fun, patient, encouraging. Built around what kids actually care about: games, stories, topics they love. So the language sticks.

items.title: Conversation First
items.description: You speak from the first minute. No grammar lectures before you earn them. Language lives in your mouth, not on a worksheet.

items.title: Grammar in Snippets
items.description: Rules come up when they are useful, right when you need them. Small, targeted, immediately applied. Nothing abstract or disconnected from real use.

items.title: Your Goals, Your Pace
items.description: Travel? Work? Exams? Or just wanting to finally feel comfortable? Every session is built around what you are working toward. We start there, always.

items.title: The moment students stop translating in their heads
items.body: It usually happens around session 8 or 10. Something clicks. They stop reaching for German first and just speak. That is the moment I love most in coaching.

items.title: Why exam prep works best when you stop teaching to the test
items.body: Students who pass B2 almost by accident, because they actually learned to communicate, always outperform those who only drilled test format. The language does the heavy lifting.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: First session is free. No commitment. Just 30 minutes to see if we click.

whatsapp.message: Hi Niki! I would like to book a free trial session.

footer.description: Breaking language blocks, one conversation at a time.

about.headline: Hello, I am Niki.
about.bio: Since 2016, language coaching has been my daily life. English, German and Hungarian are not just subjects I teach, they are the languages I live in: at the market, in job interviews, in board meetings, and over coffee with friends. I have worked with 53 students so far. 50 reached their goal. The other three are still welcome back any time.
